tasks.intent:
You are on BoatTrader search results showing private seller boats near Miami FL (33101), priced $35,000+.

1. Click on the FIRST listing in the results to open it
2. Scroll through the listing page
3. Look in the Description section and More Details section for a phone number
4. A phone number looks like: (555) 555-5555, 555-555-5555, or 10 consecutive digits
5. Also note the year, make, model (from the title), asking price, and boat type
6. Read the current URL from the address bar

Call done(success=true) with a summary reporting:
- Whether a phone number was found (viable or not)
- The phone number if found
- Year, make, model, price
- The listing URL
